setting.note: A farmhouse in rural western Estonia, the woods around it, and the country town beyond, held across the decades from the deportations of the 1940s to the first free summer of 1992. From this Laanemaa yard the story pulls east to Tallinn and, in the trafficking chapters, out of the country altogether.

rights.originalWork: In copyright. Sofi Oksanen, first published in Finnish as Puhdistus in 2008. This book is mapped as a cited work: we store none of its text and reproduce no passages. The places are facts and the notes are our own.
rights.textSource: None stored. A cited book reproduces no text.
rights.territoryNotes: Locations and original commentary only. No reproduction of the copyrighted text, in any territory.
rights.attribution: Purge, Sofi Oksanen (2008). Locations mapped by Read the Places; not affiliated with or endorsed by the author or publisher.

palette.note: The grey of a Soviet-era farmhouse and the birch woods in winter. A cited book's colour is not a quotation, because we store no text to quote; it still has to be legible, and this clears WCAG AA on paper.
